email_body:
Beste recruiter,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Ecommerce Manager in de retailsector. Mijn ervaring in SEO, contentmanagement en website-optimalisatie sluit goed aan bij de vereisten voor deze rol.

Bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte content en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com gewerkt aan gestructureerde data, entity-optimalisatie en technische SEO/GEO-audits om de zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik ben vertrouwd met Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush en Ahrefs, en ik heb ervaring met UX/UI-principes via Elementor en Astra.

Hoewel mijn ervaring in e-commerce nog groeit, ben ik gemotiveerd om mijn vaardigheden in te zetten voor het ontwikkelen van datagedreven strategieën, het optimaliseren van marketplace-prestaties en het verbeteren van de klantervaring. Ik spreek Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve lessen).

Ik kijk uit naar de mogelijkheid om mijn motivatie en ervaring in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear recruiter,

I am writing with great enthusiasm to apply for the Ecommerce Manager position in the retail sector. My experience in SEO, content management, and website optimization aligns well with the requirements of this role.

At Episto, I perform on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and manage WordPress sites. Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I have worked on structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. I am familiar with Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, and Ahrefs, and I have experience with UX/UI principles through Elementor and Astra.

While my e-commerce experience is still growing, I am motivated to apply my skills in developing data-driven strategies, optimizing marketplace performance, and enhancing customer experience. I speak English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons).

I look forward to the opportunity to further discuss my motivation and experience in an interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste recruiter,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Ecommerce Manager in de retailsector. Uw oproep voor een strategische, datagedreven professional die e-commerce kan optimaliseren en de klantervaring kan verbeteren, sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, keyword-gerichte contentcreatie en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-sites met Elementor en Astra. Ik analyseer prestaties met tools zoals Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush en Ahrefs, en gebruik deze inzichten om zoekzichtbaarheid en gebruikerservaring te verbeteren. Deze ervaring heeft mij een solide basis gegeven in de technische en analytische aspecten van e-commerce, zoals SEO, UX/UI en datagestuurde optimalisatie.

Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com gewerkt aan gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema), entity-optimalisatie en GEO/AEO-technieken om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines te vergroten. Dit project heeft mij geleerd hoe belangrijk een naadloze customer journey en gepersonaliseerde betrokkenheid zijn.

Hoewel mijn directe e-commerce ervaring nog in ontwikkeling is, ben ik vastbesloten om mijn vaardigheden te verdiepen in marketplace-optimalisatie, multichannelstrategieën en retentiecampagnes. Ik ben een snelle leerder, werk gestructureerd en communiceer vloeiend in het Engels en Turks. Mijn Nederlands is B1, en ik volg actief lessen om dit verder te verbeteren.

Ik ben ervan overtuigd dat ik met mijn technische achtergrond en groeiende e-commerce kennis een waardevolle bijdrage kan leveren aan uw team. Ik hoop mijn motivatie en ervaring in een persoonlijk gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear recruiter,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Ecommerce Manager position in the retail sector. Your call for a strategic, data-driven professional who can optimize e-commerce and enhance customer experience aligns perfectly with my experience and ambition.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content creation, and building and maintaining WordPress sites with Elementor and Astra. I analyze performance using tools such as Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, and Ahrefs, and use these insights to improve search visibility and user experience. This experience has given me a solid foundation in the technical and analytical aspects of e-commerce, including SEO, UX/UI, and data-driven optimization.

Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I have worked on structured data (JSON-LD schema), entity optimization, and GEO/AEO techniques to increase visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. This project has taught me the importance of a seamless customer journey and personalized engagement.

Although my direct e-commerce experience is still developing, I am determined to deepen my skills in marketplace optimization, multichannel strategies, and retention campaigns. I am a fast learner, work in a structured manner, and communicate fluently in English and Turkish. My Dutch is B1, and I am actively taking lessons to improve further.

I am confident that with my technical background and growing e-commerce knowledge, I can make a valuable contribution to your team. I hope to further explain my motivation and experience in a personal interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• On-page SEO, keyword research, and content creation for e-commerce and client websites
• Proficient in web analytics tools (Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs)
• Experience with UX/UI principles via WordPress, Elementor, and Astra
• Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema) and entity optimization for improved search visibility
• Strong analytical and data-driven approach to optimize performance and customer experience
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · E-commerce · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and e-commerce optimization. At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client websites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable with web analytics tools, content management, and UX/UI principles; growing into e-commerce content management, marketplace optimization, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & E-commerce: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility), marketplace optimization
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
